price: 88. The Day whereon neither wealth nor sons will avail,
arabic: يَوۡمَ لَا يَنفَعُ مَالٞ وَلَا بَنُونَ

version.title: English Translation - Hilali and Khan
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into English by Taqi-ud-Din Al-Hilali and Muhsen Khan

meta.transliteration: yawma lā yanfaʿu mālun walā banūna
